title: Example — delete me
summary:
Demo module so you can feel the app before your real notes land.

Bold in your PDF becomes a **weak spot** — it gets its own red deck, repeats until you've nailed it 4 times, and jumps to the front of every day's goal.

Once a PDF is in inbox/, it becomes:
• Active-recall flashcards (spaced repetition)
• A topic checklist with confidence bars
• A verbatim summary like this — **never reworded or corrected**

Delete content/00-example.json anytime.
flags: This is an example of a 'possible issue' flag. If your note said something that looks dated, it shows up here — your card stays exactly as you wrote it.

cards.q: Demo card: what does rating a card **Again** do?
cards.a: It resets the interval and the card returns in ~1 minute. **Good** pushes the next review further out each time (SM-2).

cards.q: Demo card: how is a first-line STEMI treatment delivered within 12h of onset?
cards.a: Primary **PCI**. Thrombolysis only if PCI isn't available within 120 min.
